user_reviews.text: Microless came through for me with the RAM shortage we are currently going through. RAM was received as specified:Titanium 32GB (2x16GB) DDR5 RGB Desktop Memory Kit, 6000MHz Memory Speed, CL30 CAS Latency, 1.40V Memory Voltage, 288 Pin, XMP / AMD, iCUE Cmpt, Gray | CMP32GX5M2B6000Z30, and it is working flawlessly in my new build. Thank you microless for controlling the price and shipping the item at a reasonable time frame.

user_reviews.title: Reliable and Easy to set up
user_reviews.text: Great ram. Unfortunate price hikes make them really innacesible to budget builders
Mới nhận hàng là review liền, hàng đóng gói ok, khi nào ráp máy sử dụng mới test đc hiệu năng, thank shop
